title: Flush stdin after writing to a pager
body:
I would love to see text immediately in this toy example:
```python
import click
import os
import time

def _generator():
    for i in range(10000):
        time.sleep(0.01)
        yield f"{i+1:07}\n"

@click.command
def main():
    os.environ.setdefault("LESS", "-XFR")
    click.echo_via_pager(_generator())

main()
```
As it is currently, nothing will show until 512 lines have been `yield`ed.
I suspect a flush after this line would do the trick:
https://github.com/pallets/click/blob/cdab890e57a30a9f437b88ce9652f7bfce980c1f/src/click/_termui_impl.py#L468

Related: #2542 ☹️
